narrative:
Lewis Twp North (precinct in Brown County) has 1,136 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
